creator: mkes@ra.rockwell.com
text:
When I copied bunch of MP3 files from a CD changer (Nakamichi MJ-5.16) 
to a hard drive I got following kernel messages and some files got 
copied with zero length:

> vm_fault: pager read error, pid 2551 (cp)
> (cd4:ahc0:0:5:4): READ(10). CDB: 28 80 0 3 40 5c 0 0 1 0 
> (cd4:ahc0:0:5:4): NOT READY asc:4,3
> (cd4:ahc0:0:5:4): Logical unit not ready, manual intervention required
> (cd4:ahc0:0:5:4): cddone: got error 0x6 back
> vm_fault: pager read error, pid 2551 (cp)
